elements.instruction: The requirement is 100% finished and 80% packed in the box.
elements.expectedResult:
New Era prefers production orders to be 100% sewing finished and 80% packed into the box for pre-shipment inspection (PSI). 

Once the factory can’t reach the quantity requirement, the Inspector informs the protocol team, and the protocol team emails the client the product status

If the product is not 100% finished and packed but 60-80% finished. Client accepts DUPRO Inspections (during production) and inspector remarks into the report “This is dupro inspection because goods are xx% finished”

If less than 60% are finished, the Quality team sends an email to the client and the client decides if the inspection should go forward at the lower completion level or missing If no timely feedback before noon time 12:00. please continue the inspection and fail the quantity check.

Please input the total quantity finished and packed in pcs and %, the total quantity finished and unpacked in pcs and %.
Pls follow the below template on your comment.
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Packed
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Unpacked

Please follow the mandatory picture document to take the picture.

elements.name: Defect Breakdown

elements.instruction:
Were you able to select the cartons / sampling size fully randomly ? 
If yes, the result is passed, If not, the result is failed.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Take a picture of the stacks of cartons before selection​
2. Choose cartons from every pallet/stack.​
3. Choose cartons from different parts of the stack (top, bottom, left, right, front, back, middle, inside), including not accessible cartons ​
4. Ask factory for support in moving the goods if they are not accessible​
5. Take a picture of the stack after the selecting the cartons, showing how the random selection was done. ​
6. Take a picture of all selected cartons​
7. Follow the cartons from the warehouse to the inspection area, make sure they are not tempered with.  ​
8. Add a remark in the report and inform back-office if you cannot proceed with the random carton selection, explaining the reason.
elements.name: Random carton selection

elements.expectedResult:
Upload a picture of the stacks / pallets before the carton selection following the example of attached picture.

Limit the "Carton Select" photos to:
- one (1) Carton Before Selection
elements.name: Cartons before selection

elements.expectedResult:
Upload a picture of the stacks / pallets after the carton selection following the example of attached picture.
Through this picture, the client / back-office should be able to verify that the carton selection has been done randomly.
elements.name: Cartons after selection

elements.expectedResult:
Upload a picture of all selected cartons following the example of attached picture.

Limit the "Carton Select" photos to:
- one (1) Selected Carton
elements.name: Selected cartons

elements.expectedResult:
Limit the "Carton Select" photos to:
- two (2) The environment of the Warehouse & Carton Storage
elements.name: Warehouse & carton storage environment

elements.expectedResult: - one (1) The data displayed by the thermometer (with RH%) in the warehouse
elements.name: Thermometer display in the warehouse (including RH

testsChecklist.name: New Era Cap - Garment- Product Dimensions

elements.instruction:
1/ Upload measurement charts (excel) 
2/ Upload all pictures of measurements, measurement charts (excel) and screenshot of the measurement charts. For the screenshot, use the spotlight feature to enlarge the screenshot in the final report.
elements.expectedResult:
-The garment always measure 300 POM covering all size/artwork.
-For Garment inspection only: 
1. When measurement is out of tolerance, we will give N/A result
2. Give comment of " Subject to Clients Evaluation

-The cap sample size is 60: 20pcs for each silhouette measurement on the circumference, and shape, visor height, back opening height. 6pcs of each with Seam 1, Seam 2, Seam 3, Left to Right Middle Panel measurement. if the measurement is beyond the tolerance and it should be called a Major defect, it should be reflected and counted into the workmanship appearance column. So the AQL is 2.5

comment.message: As per instruction measured 20 pcs and 7 pcs found out of tolerance “Subject to Client's Evaluation”. Please refer to the measurement chart for details.

elements.name: Product Dimensions Result

columns.name: Total # of POM out of tolerance
Total # of POM out of tolerance

actions.instructions:
1. Report writing - The Inspector must add a remark to indicate any re-inspection. 
- Example of Inspector's remark format: This is re-inspection from R-Cloud-25083616

2. Special Checkpoint - The inspector must pay attention to some special checkpoints for the "NFL" PO as per the attached file. 

3. Specification check for CAP:
- If 10 or less than 10 logos - check all logos
- If 20 or more than 10 logos - check 10 logos and randomly take pictures of 3 - 5 logos (according to the picture requirement).

4. For garments, follow the client specs tolerance.

metadata.filename: Special Checkpoints for  NFL sideline orders (Cap).pdf

elements.instruction:
Please fill the Apparel type like T-shirt/Jacket/Hoodie/Pants.
If your order have several types please fill together
elements.expectedResult: Please fill the type
elements.value: SS Tee, Short, Jacket, Hoody, Pant, LS POLO
elements.name: Apparel Type

elements.instruction: The program name is in excel item list downloaded in GI
elements.expectedResult: Please fill the Program name (column G)
elements.name: Program Name

elements.instruction: The Order Region is in excel item list downloaded in GI (Column I)
elements.expectedResult: Please fill the Order Region
elements.name: Order Region

elements.instruction:
1. Close and open the zip.
2. Measure zip length
3. Handle zip and put some pressure on it when it closed.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The zip should lock when it closed
2. The zip should not open from the middle
3. The zip must be firmly stopped and not detach when sliding to the end
4. The zip length should be within tolerance
5. The zip quality should be out of any visual defects nor waving.
elements.name: Zipper test

elements.instruction:
1. Check that there is no obvious damage from needles from construction.
2. Pull the seams by hand using force (70N for 10s) to inspect the needle holes for defects.
elements.expectedResult: There shall be no needle damage.
elements.name: Needle damage check

elements.instruction:
1. Check the button and stitching and compare with specifications (dimensions, shape, color, material, holes)
2. Check the stitches and button are fixed securely by pulling on the buttons.
3. Test the button fits the buttonhole securely and is able to be disengaged afterwards.
4. Check that the buttons are placed correctly and well spaced according to specifications or approval sample.                                                                          5. Check for spare buttons (if specified).
elements.expectedResult:
1. The button and stitching shall be correct and to specifications.
2. The button and stitching shall be fixed securely.
3. The button shall fit through the buttonhole and be secure 1 through but able to be disengaged afterwards.
4. The buttons shall be spaced to specifications or to approval sample.
5. The extra buttons shall be included.
elements.name: Button check

elements.instruction:
1. Use a calibrated scale to measure the actual weight of the product against specifications or approval sample.
2. If not specified, the tolerance is ±5%.
elements.expectedResult: The weight shall be to specifications or approval sample within tolerances.
elements.name: Weight check

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the product is well ironed (if specified)
2. Check that the product can be folded into the specified shape (if specified)
3. Check that the product has been washed and/or treated (if specified)
elements.expectedResult: The product should be ironed, washed and/or treated as per the specifications.
elements.name: Ironing, washing, treatment check

elements.instruction:
Check that the pattern is even (if specified), of the correct dimensions, and of the right design to specifications or to approval samples.

Check the locations where different parts meet each other and ensure that the pattern is matching on each part.
elements.expectedResult: The pattern shall be correct to specifications or to approval samples.
elements.name: Pattern, stripes, grid check

elements.instruction:
1. Check the specified pockets / holders and compare with specifications or approval sample.
2. Check that the pocket / holder is formed and finished and compare with specifications or to approval sample.
3.The pocket should be reinforced by a bartack or rivet, following the specifications.
elements.expectedResult: The specified pockets / holders are present, attached correctly and attached in the correct positions. As per specification, bartacks or rivets reinforce the pocket.
elements.name: Pocket / holder check

elements.instruction: Use the product on a model, doll or dummy and verify that there is no issues. Test with each size available.
elements.expectedResult: The product should be correctly sized, balanced, and behave correctly.
elements.name: Model fitting check

elements.instruction:
1. Cut the material to standardized size and number, and from specified sections for use with the GSM tester.
2. Compare to specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
The weight of the material shall be to specifications

The inspector must add a clear remark on the outcome of this test and add pictures. 
Must comment whether it is "within tolerance or out of tolerance"
elements.name: Fabric weight test

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the product includes a hanger.
2. Check that the hanger matches the specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1, The hanger shall be included with the product.
2. The hanger shall be up to the specifications.
elements.name: Hanger check

elements.instruction: Pull button, snap, hook, bar, handle or attachment with the specified force and duration.
elements.expectedResult: The part shall not break, not deform or be damaged in anyway during or after use.
elements.name: Pull test

elements.instruction: Repeatedly use the product and its adjustable parts to the full extent of their capacity for 20 cycles, or following the client specifications if there is any.
elements.expectedResult: The product or part shall not break, deform or be damaged in anyway after use; it should still function normally, without any loss.
elements.name: Fatigue test

elements.instruction:
1. Smell the product, checking for any odor;
2. Compare to that of the approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: No offensive or unexpected odor.
elements.name: Odor check

elements.instruction:
1. Rub the product or label with a dry white cotton cloth ten times over a 10cm distance with a force of 9N (1kg).
2. Rub the product or a label with a white cotton cloth soaked with water ten times over a 10cm distance with a force of 9N (1kg).
3. Rub the product or a label with white cotton cloth soaked with petroleum spirit ten times over a 10cm distance with a force of 9N (1kg).
(follow client specification).
elements.expectedResult:
1. There shall be no color transfer greater than 4 on a grey scale (between the original white cloth and the colored one) after the dry test.
2. There shall be no color transfer greater than 3-4 on a grey scale (between the original white cloth and the colored one) after the wet test.
3. The product or label's print shall stay fixed onto its surface and not dull or peel away. (be damaged)
4. The rating label shall not roll up, peel away or be damaged in any way.
elements.name: Rubbing (textile) test

elements.instruction: Pull the product by hand at the seam location to test the strength of the seam.
elements.expectedResult: The seam should not break.
elements.name: Seam strength test

elements.instruction:
1. Check the binding material used and compare with specifications or approval sample.
2. Check that the binding method is correct to specifications or to approval sample.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The binding material shall be correct to specifications or to approval sample.
2. The binding method shall be correct to specifications or to approval sample.
elements.name: Binding check

elements.instruction:
For each size:
- Stretch the elastic waistband and compare the stretched length to the specifications;
elements.expectedResult: The stretched length should be within tolerances.
elements.name: Elastic waistband stretched length

elements.instruction:
1. Pull the elastic part by hand to stretch it;
2. Relieve the stress and observe how the product recovers its original shape.
elements.expectedResult: The product should not be deformed and should recover its original shape.
elements.name: Elastic recovery check

elements.instruction: Check that the colors are conform to the specifications from the client, and record the corresponding pantone code and / or deviation from the expected result.
elements.expectedResult: Product shall be in the correct shade / color inside of the allowable 4-5 color shading range.
elements.name: Color specification check

elements.instruction: Check the stuffing of the item is stuffed (follow client requirements).
elements.expectedResult: The product shall be clean, dry and contains no foreign objects.
elements.name: Stuffing check

elements.expectedResult: There should not be any peel off after the tape is removed, nor any color transferred onto the tape.
elements.name: Adhesive test
Metal / needle detection check

elements.instruction:
Test the function(s) of the product, to the full extent of its capacities during the visual check.

If available, apply the instructions given with the client specifications or on the product instructions.
elements.expectedResult: The product should function well and in line with any client specification, product instruction manual and/or approved sample. Report any discrepancy.
elements.name: Function test

elements.expectedResult: The deviation should be within the acceptable range as per the specifications, if there is no specification available, use grey scale 4 as the acceptable limit.
elements.name: Color shading check

elements.instruction:
Check the quantity and assortment in each package.
Record the assortment of the package (number of piece of each model, color, etc.)
elements.expectedResult: The quantity and assortment should match the expectations.
elements.name: Quantity and assortment check (per package)

elements.instruction:
1. Connect scanner to a PC or use a mobile phone to scan the barcode. 
2. Scan any barcode on the product and the carton, compare the results to the code under the barcodes (if any) and to the specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Barcode must match the client's specifications.
2. It should be scannable and have the correct number.
elements.name: Barcode scanning test

elements.instruction: Check the dimensions, shape, style or color of the product against the approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: The products should be matched with the approval sample.

comment.message: No approved sample available but inspector checked by tech pack and found ok.

elements.name: Approval sample comparison

elements.instruction: Count the number of stitches per inch compared to specifications or approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: The number of stitches per inch are correct to specifications or approval sample.
elements.name: Stitch density check

elements.instruction: Ensure that the product symmetry is respected: if possible, fold the product on its symmetry axis to do so and otherwise use a measurement tool to compare.
elements.expectedResult: The product should be symmetric (unless specified otherwise).
elements.name: Symmetry check

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the specified labels are found attached to the product.
2. Check that the information of the label is correct to specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. All specified labels shall be present and attached correctly to the product.
2. The information on the labels shall be correct to specifications.
3. It should not have been modified by hand or with extra sticker.
elements.name: Label check

elements.instruction:
1. Use machine provided by the factory, measure the product.
2. Check that the cartons are on pallets (no contact with walls / floor, at least 0.5m away from window), dry (check the bottom of cartons) and without moisture or mold. 
3. Check that the storing areas for cartons, products, fabrics and materials are clean, dry, with ventilation and without mold / water on walls. 
4. Check that the storing area's humidity is to / below specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The number on the machine should be meeting New Era Cap tolerance (atttached)
2. Are the cartons stored in correct conditions and free from any effect from moisture?
3. Are the storage areas clean, dry, ventilated and without presence of molde/ water ?
4. Is the humidity follow specifications?
elements.name: Moisture Test for Garment

defects.name: Dirt marks (MAJ)
defects.description:
1. The product contains serious dirt marks visible more than 1m away.

2. The dirt mark is bigger than 2cm.

defects.name: Untrimmed Thread Ends
defects.description:
Untrimmed thread ends, raw edge of surface (edge, buttonhole opening) or knots found at the surface.
If the product is:
- for children: defect must be less than 0.5 cm, 
- others: defect must be less than:
                     * 2.5 cm outside
                     * 10 cm inside

defects.name: Hems and seams defects (MIN)
defects.description:
1. The hems and / or seams present unevenness, bubbling, wrinkles, thickness variation, twisting / curling, pulling or hiking seam, or needle chew only visible less than 1m away.
2. The hems and seams defect does not affect the product's design or structure.

defects.name: Poor finishing
defects.description: Poor finishing of the product, or different from the specified finishing.

defects.name: Yarn defects (MIN)
defects.description: Product contains the specified yarn, but the yarn's application is defective (yarn drawn out / needle line, knot, pilling, or fly yarn) and only visible less than 1m away.

defects.name: Wrinkles / Puckering / Creases / Waves
defects.description: The product contains wrinkles or creases only visible less than 1m away.

defects.name: Wrinkles / Puckering / Creases / Waves
defects.description: The product contains wrinkles or creases visible from 1m away.

defects.name: Stitching defects (MAJ)
defects.description:
1. Stitch breakage, or bulkiness/ changing stitch density.
2. Looseness, tightness, or improper cast-on.
3. Wavy stitching, margin variation from specifications, run off/ drop off, unevenness, slanting, untidy or uneven joints, or poor back stitching;
4. Only visible from 1m away.

actions.instructions:
1. Did you insert humidity test picture?
2. Did you fill the excel AQL in GI and screen cut and insert into QIMAone report?
3. Did you mention the item number, PO, in the excel AQL? as per guideline, even 0 defect need to be mentioned.
4. Did you refer to the mandatory picture example ?

actions.text:
Issued by QIMA Inspection (Shenzhen) Limited
Reviewed by Joseph Wang

THE ABOVE RESULT(S) REFLECT(S) QIMA LIMITED’S FINDINGS AT THE TIME AND PLACE OF INSPECTION. THIS REPORT DOES NOT RELEASE THE BUYER OR SELLER FROM CONTRACTUAL RESPONSIBILITIES, NOR DOES IT PREJUDICE THE BUYER’S RIGHT OF CLAIM TOWARD THE SELLER/SUPPLIER FOR COMPENSATION FOR ANY APPARENT AND/OR HIDDEN DEFECTS NOT DETECTED DURING INSPECTION OR OCCURRING ANYTIME THEREAFTER.

globalRemark.message:
1/ As per booking quantity is 21334 pcs, factory provided packing/offer list for ready carton packed quantity 21334 pcs (100.00%) of 1130 cartons.
2/ As per instruction measured 20 pcs and 7 pcs found out of tolerance “Subject to Client's Evaluation”. Please refer to the measurement chart for details.
3/ During the Inspection, client approved sample is not available onsite. So, inspector checked style, color and material as per supplier provided tech pack, artwork, trims card reference. 
4/ During inspection found some carton shipping mark sticker is partly attached.
As per supplier confirmation to avoid sticker damage due to carton height, they will attached full sticker after inspection.
